content.en:
After all, there are many strong people here in Zhenyi Mountain, and once they condense their clones, they will inevitably attract the attention of those strong people.

Therefore, Ye Tian let the clone stay in the dark forbidden realm, and he could also assist in replicating the body and practicing in the world of will.

As time passed, Ye Tian's will suppression became stronger and stronger.

Although Ye Tian could cultivate here for an eternal year, and so did others, no one would persist until an eternal year.

After some years of tribulation, Ye Tian felt that his will had improved a lot, so he let the clone start to try to open up the world of will.

At the beginning, of course, the Will World failed, but after many attempts, Ye Tian still found the right position to open up the Will World.

In this way, the ontological body and the replicating body begin to open up the world of will.

In this way, the number of Ye Tian's will worlds became more and more.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had cultivated in Zhenyi Mountain for hundreds of thousands of years.

At this time, even the True Yang Saint Ancestor was shocked

"I actually practiced 317 on the top of Zhenyi Mountain for so long!!!

True Yang Saint Ancestor felt that he couldn't even cultivate at the top of True Yi Mountain for such a long time, and he couldn't withstand the suppression of True Yi Mountain's will at all, and if he forcibly stayed there, there would be problems with his will

But now I've been here for so long, and I don't see anything wrong.

Obviously, Ye Tian's willpower was much stronger than him, and after a long period of penance, his will had barely stepped into the second-order Eternal Will.

But now compared with Ye Tianyi, the gap is very big.

"I'm afraid that even some of the will of the Eternal Realm is inferior to him!"

True Yang Holy Ancestor guessed.

Hundreds of thousands of years have passed

And Ye Tian has been cultivating here for an eternal year, and his will has improved a lot

Now, he has opened up nearly a thousand worlds of will during this time.

Currently, the number of worlds of his will has reached 6277.

However, in the later stage, it is more difficult to open up a will world, even if he cultivates in the True Intention Mountain for endless years in the future, he will not be able to raise the will world to 10,000, I am afraid that he needs a better will training treasure land to hope to increase to more than 10,000.

Of course, Ye Tian was already very satisfied with this penance (babh).

The improvement of his will has increased Ye Tian's strength a lot. Moreover, in such a long period of time, Ye Tian's body has not done nothing, and has been cultivating the roulette secret technique, compressing his own half-step eternal power.

He didn't create it out of thin air, but took the roulette secret technique as the core, absorbing the essence of other eternal compression secret techniques, and perfecting and improving the roulette secret technique step by step. Now, the effect of the roulette secret technique has been greatly improved, and he has perfected it to a 33-fold degree.

In other words, the Roulette Arcane Technique can compress up to 33 times the power of half-step eternity, and the effect is much more powerful than the original.

Under the new roulette secret technique, Ye Tian successfully compressed the half-step eternal power by eight times, which was already quite a good degree of compression.

Eight times compressed, adding nearly a thousand will worlds, which directly increased Ye Tian's strength a lot.

Now, Ye Tian had already sensed the existence of the First Boundary Barrier, but he still hadn't really touched the First World Barrier.

He felt that he only needed to compress the half-step eternal power to ten times, and then he would reach the First Boundary Barrier, and thus have the qualifications to attack the First Boundary Barrier

"It's time to get out!"

Ye Tian got up and flew out of Zhenyi Mountain.

As soon as he flew out of Zhenyi Mountain, the figure of the Dao stopped Ye Tian.

"The strong, the real strong!"

Ye Tian felt threatened, the other party's strength was much stronger than him, he was not an opponent.

Combined with the situation detected by the copying talent, he immediately knew who the person in front of him was.

The master of the Shaoyang Territory, the half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse of the Eight Extremes Realm, the True Yang Holy Ancestor.

"I've seen the True Yang Holy Ancestor"

Ye Tian said politely.

The True Yang Saint Ancestor was not surprised that Ye Tian was able to guess his identity, but invited, "Are you interested in going to my True Yang Palace to sit?"

"It's an honor!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Immediately, Ye Tian followed the True Yang Holy Ancestor to the True Yang Palace, which was the residence and cultivation place of the True Yang Holy Ancestor.

"I don't know what Your Excellency is called?"

True Yang Saint Ancestor asked

"Endless Ancestor!"

Ye Tian introduced himself

"Endless Ancestor, I'm afraid you're about to reach the level of the Eight Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, right?"

"It's still a long way off," Ye Tian shook his head, "From the Seven Extremes Realm to the Eight Extremes Realm, the first boundary barrier must be broken, and I may not be able to break it." "

"Hahaha!!" True Yang Saint Ancestor said with a smile: "With the Endless Ancestor, you have reached the realm of the second-order Eternal Will, and it is naturally easy to break the barrier of the first boundary. "

"The Second Order Eternal Will can assist in breaking the barrier of the First Boundary?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he really didn't know.

"Naturally, it can!" True Yang Saint Ancestor nodded, "It's just that there are very few people in the Extreme Realm who have raised their will to the second-order Eternal Will without breaking the barrier of the First Boundary. I barely reached the second-order Eternal Will, and I did it by breaking the barrier of the first boundary, greatly improving my willpower, and after countless years of penance cultivation in the True Meaning Mountain. An ordinary eight-pole realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse, and his will is still at the first level."

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately excited.

In this way, as long as he completely touches the level of the first boundary barrier, with a slight impact, will he have a great hope of breaking the first boundary barrier and stepping into the half-step eternal realm level of the Eight Extremes Realm?

He also finally knew why the True Yang Holy Ancestor invited him as a guest, and it turned out that he regarded him as the future Eight-Pole Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian chatted with the True Yang Holy Ancestor, learned a lot of secrets, and greatly expanded his knowledge.

When the True Yang Holy Ancestor learned that Ye Tian had joined the Tower of Doom, he couldn't help but say: "Endless Ancestor, there is no need for the Tower of Doom to join, in fact, even those Eight Extremes Realm of the Tower of Doom don't care much about the Tower of Doom Although the Tower of Doom is an idle force and has no constraints, it can't bring you any benefits at all." I suggest that you join the force of the Eight Pole Building, the Eight Pole Building is also an idle force, the entry requirements are extremely high, the Eight Extremes Realm is only qualified to join the half-step Eternal Realm, and the influence is very great, even many Eternal Realms do not dare to offend the Eight Poles Building. And those eternal realms that came out of the Eight Poles Building,They are all the real powerhouses in the Eternal Realm.,Occasionally give the Eight Poles Building a little chanceム It can be said that more than half of the Eight Extremes Realm that did not take refuge in the Eternal Realm have joined the Eight Poles Building.,The few Eight Extremes Realm in your Tower of Doom are also members of the Eight Poles Building-。 "

After Ye Tian weighed it, he decided to join the Baji Building.

However, that had to be after he really stepped into the Eight-Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, not now. _
